text.title: Supabase Backup and Restore Drill Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Supabase Backup and Restore Drill end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: prepare-clone
step.action: Confirm target is empty + NOT the prod project.
step.decision-gate: If target_project == prod_project, abort — refuse the drill.

step.name: restore
step.action: Initiate restore (provider API or pg_restore from pg_dump). Record start + end timestamps.

step.name: validate
step.action: Run row-count per table + md5sum (or pg_dump diff). Compute row_count_delta.

step.name: record-evidence
step.action: Emit DrillReport JSON; validate with script; archive.
